$comment: Photo slideshow settings. Editable from the central Settings hub or the placed widget's cog. `account` is filled in by the OAuth flow (one shared Drive account). The source folder is per-widget and stored separately under folder:<instanceId>. intervalSec = how long each photo shows; screensaver = whether the slideshow also takes over the whole screen when idle (it has its own globally-chosen folder, stored under folder:__screensaver__); idleSec = idle seconds before that happens.
